case_title: KLOBAS, JANICE VS LOWER LAKE LOCKER COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY KLOBAS, JANICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOWER LAKE LOCKER COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PLTF'S DECL:ON CERT.MAIL FORM:UNDERSTAND SRVC ON P O BOX DIFFICULT TO OBTAIN.
CERTIFIED MAIL TO JOHN REEDY, PRES, JOHN REEDY CORP.RETURNED SIGNED;
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT ON NAME OF DEF. FILED. SENT TO COMMISIONER FOR APPROVAL.
PLTF. CLAIM W/ AMENDED NAME MAILED TO PLTF. W/ INSTRUCTIONS TO RE-SET AND RE-SERVE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KLOBAS, JANICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOWER LAKE LOCKER COMPANY, INC. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KLOBAS, JANICE HEARING SET FOR AUG-11-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-11-1999, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KLOBAS, JANICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOWER LAKE LOCKER COMPANY, INC. $2,958.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,984.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
